[TITLE]: Sky 5 flies over large outdoor fire in Cumberland County
[METADATA/INTRO]: Local News Sky 5 flies over large outdoor fire in Cumberland County...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Sky 5 flies over large outdoor fire in Cumberland County 
 Officials said the fire happened on Stoney Point and Gillis Hill roads in Cumberland County. Sky 5 flew over the scene where large clouds of smoke were still seen coming from the field. Crews were also seen working on what looked to be a tractor also damaged by the flames.

 As to the future potential for the fire reoccurring, National Weather Service meteorologist Al Sandrik said the cloud coverage they saw all morning has helped with fire control. 
 “We are watching to see if we get any breaks in the clouds later this afternoon, ” he said. “With the winds that we do have, we would have a situation where a fire could begin to spark, so again that is something we’re watching very closely.”
